debug_info.goal:
E : Type u_1
inst✝⁶ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝⁵ : NormedSpace ℝ E
H : Type u_2
inst✝⁴ : TopologicalSpace H
I : ModelWithCorners ℝ E H
M : Type u_3
inst✝³ : TopologicalSpace M
inst✝² : ChartedSpace H M
inst✝¹ : (x : M) → ENorm (TangentSpace I x)
inst✝ : ∀ (x : M), ENormSMulClass ℝ (TangentSpace I x)
x y : M
r : ENNReal
a b : ℝ
hr : @Manifold.riemannianEDist E inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ H inst✝⁴ I M inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ x y < r
⊢ ∃ γ,
    γ a = x ∧
      γ b = y ∧
        ContMDiff (modelWithCornersSelf ℝ ℝ) I 1 γ ∧
          (γ =ᶠ[nhds a] fun x_1 => x) ∧
            (γ =ᶠ[nhds b] fun x => y) ∧
              @Manifold.pathELength E inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ H inst✝⁴ I M inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ γ a b < r

proof:
obtain ⟨γ, hγ, h⟩ := exists_contMDiff_of_riemannianEDist_lt hr
  exact ⟨γ, hγ.1, hγ.2, hγ.3, hγ.4, hγ.5, h⟩
